message:
fix(runtime/codegen): Add errno module and fix exception handling

Runtime changes:
- Create Lib/errno.zig with POSIX errno constants (EEXIST, EAGAIN, etc.)
- Export errno in runtime.zig Lib struct
- Fix equality.zig to check struct type before @hasField call
  (anyopaque doesn't support @hasField)

Codegen changes:
- Update import_registry to use runtime.Lib.errno path
- Fix genInitMethodWithBuiltinBase to use correct param name (init vs init_def)
- Fix stmtContainsBareReturn to handle non-optional finalbody slice
- Fix bare return in __init__ methods to return __self

Unblocks: from errno import EEXIST pattern in test_exception_hierarchy
